calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Sinae Chung
Off Calendar Mar-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:24 and comcluding at 9:26 am.

Plaintiff Timur Davis is represented by James Hann, Esq.
Defendant Sinae Chung is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Timur Davis, and against Defendant Sinae Chung, as follows:

1. Damages: $0
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $0
Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: James C. Hann, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause Hearing is reset to Jan-09-2024 at 10:30am in Dept 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)
